spec_natural_language: function increaseLiquidity MUST revert when caller is not the owner or approved operator of the specified tokenId

violated_invariant.precondition: caller is not the owner of params.tokenId AND caller is not approved for params.tokenId
violated_invariant.expected_behavior: Only the token owner or an approved address should be able to increase liquidity for a given position

extraction_reasoning: The finding explicitly states that increaseLiquidity lacks authorization check and any user can increase liquidity of any position regardless of ownership. The fix is clearly specified: add isAuthorizedForToken modifier. The invariant is unambiguous - only token owner or approved address should be able to call this function for a given tokenId.
